message:
feat(infra): FCP2 infrastructure crates with W3C tracing and rate limiting

Major enhancements to the FCP2 infrastructure layer.

## fcp-telemetry: W3C Trace Context Implementation

context.rs (~970 additions):
- TraceContext struct implementing W3C Trace Context specification
- 16-byte trace ID and 8-byte span ID with hex serialization
- Trace flags (sampled bit) and optional tracestate
- traceparent/tracestate header parsing and generation
- Binary serialization for efficient mesh transport

lib.rs, logging.rs, metrics.rs, tracing_layer.rs:
- Comprehensive test coverage for all telemetry components
- LegacyTraceContext export to avoid naming collision with W3C TraceContext
- Integration with OpenTelemetry exporters
- Structured logging with field redaction

## fcp-ratelimit: FCP-Specific Rate Limiting

New fcp.rs (447 lines):
- BackpressureThresholds: Warning/SoftLimit/HardLimit in basis points
- FcpRateLimiter wrapper integrating with fcp-core types
- ThrottleViolation and BackpressureSignal generation
- ConcurrencyLimiter with semaphore-based permits
- Retry-After header computation

lib.rs:
- Added try_acquire_n() method to RateLimiter trait for quota accounting
- Alphabetical module ordering

## fcp-oauth: Clippy Compliance

- Alphabetical ordering of module declarations and re-exports
- Import reorganization across all modules
- Documentation improvements

## fcp-streaming: WebSocket Enhancements

- Clippy fixes and import reordering
- Reconnection logic improvements
- Test coverage additions

## fcp-testkit: Test Infrastructure

- Clippy fixes across assertions, fixtures, harness modules
- Mock server improvements
- Tracing configuration cleanup

## fcp-webhook: Event Handling

- Clippy compliance fixes
- Provider abstraction improvements
- Signature verification updates

All changes include comprehensive unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 [package]
 name = "fcp-oauth"
-version = "0.1.0"
-edition = "2021"
 description = "Unified OAuth library for FCP connectors"
-license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
-repository = "https://github.com/anthropics/fcp"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true

 fcp-core = { path = "../fcp-core" }
